item.title: 苹果 iOS 27 AI Siri 界面曝光
item.guid: 苹果-iOS-27-AI-Siri-界面曝光
item.description:
Yesterday, Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman released a set of UI mockups for iOS 27, showcasing the new Siri interface, a new chatbot-style application, and other major iOS 27 changes Apple plans to release at WWDC26. 昨天，彭博社记者 Mark Gurman 发布了一组 iOS 27 的 UI 示意图，展示了新版 Siri 界面、新的聊天机器人式应用，以及苹果计划在 WWDC26上发布的其他 iOS 27 重大变化。

It is reported that the new version of Siri will have two launch entry points: 据悉，新版 Siri 将会有两个启动入口：

    Traditional method: That is, shouting "Siri" or long-pressing the iPhone power button will trigger the new Siri animation in the Dynamic Island.

    New method "Search or Ask": iOS 27 will allow users to swipe down from the top center of the iPhone from any location in the system to launch the new "Search or Ask" interface.

It is reported that "Search or Ask" supports voice and text input, has screen content awareness and personal data analysis capabilities, and can perform multi-level tasks across applications based on context. 据悉，「Search or Ask」支持语音与文本输入，具备屏幕内容感知及个人数据分析能力，可基于上下文跨应用执行多级任务。

In addition, Apple will launch a standalone Siri App similar to ChatGPT, which will retain historical conversation records and support multi-modal attachment uploads for AI analysis. 此外，苹果将推出类似于 ChatGPT 的独立 Siri App，该应用将保留历史对话记录，并支持多模态附件上传以供 AI 分析。

In terms of imaging and native applications, Siri will be directly integrated into the camera app for the first time, using third-party AI agents for object recognition and reverse image search. 在影像与原生应用方面，Siri 将首次直接整合进相机应用中，借由第三方 AI 代理进行物体识别与逆向图像搜索。

It is worth mentioning that iOS 27's camera interface will introduce a customizable control panel to meet professional shooting needs; the Photos app will also add computational photography features such as AI Reframe and AI Extend. 值得一提的是，iOS 27 的相机界面将引入可自定义控件面板，以满足专业拍摄需求；而相册应用则新增 AI 构图（Reframe）与 AI 扩图（Extend）等计算摄影功能。

Beyond its AI initiatives, iOS 27 will also focus on fixing bugs related to last year's "Liquid Glass" design. 在 AI 布局之外，iOS 27 还将重点修复去年「液态玻璃」（Liquid Glass）设计引发的相关 Bug。

item.title: Claude Opus 4.8 发布：快速模式成本降至三分之一
item.guid: Claude-Opus-4.8-发布：快速模式成本降至三分之一
item.description:
Early this morning, Anthropic officially released its flagship model Claude Opus 4.8, upgrading its capabilities in programming, AI agent tasks, reasoning, and knowledge work while maintaining the same pricing. 今天凌晨，Anthropic 正式发布旗舰模型 Claude Opus 4.8，在保持定价不变的前提下，对编程、AI 智能体任务、推理和知识工作能力进行了升级。

Standard mode pricing remains at $5 per million input tokens and $25 per million output tokens; fast mode pricing is $10 per million input tokens and $50 per million output tokens, with a running speed increase of approximately 2.5 times compared to the previous generation, and model costs reduced to one-third of the previous generation. 标准模式定价维持每百万输入 token 5 美元、每百万输出 token 25 美元；快速模式定价为每百万输入 token 10 美元、每百万输出 token 50 美元，运行速度较前代提升约 2.5 倍，模型成本降至前代的三分之一。

The core improvements in this upgrade lie in judgment and honesty. Official evaluations show that Opus 4.8 is about one-quarter as likely as its predecessor, Opus 4.7, to allow its own code defects to pass unexplained, and is more willing to proactively flag uncertainties, reducing conclusions lacking basis. 此次升级的核心改进在于判断力与诚实性。官方评估显示，Opus 4.8 放任自身代码缺陷未经说明通过的概率约为前代 Opus 4.7 的四分之一，更愿意主动标注不确定性，减少缺乏依据的结论。

In terms of benchmark tests, Opus 4.8 scored 69.2% on SWE-Bench Pro, higher than Opus 4.7's 64.3%, and surpassed GPT-5.5 and Gemini 3.1 Pro in multiple tests such as Agentic Coding, Agentic Computer Use, Knowledge Work, and Finance Agent. However, on the Terminal-Bench 2.1 programming benchmark, GPT-5.5's 78.2% is still higher than Opus 4.8's 74.6%. 基准测试方面，Opus 4.8 在 SWE-Bench Pro 上得分 69.2%，高于 Opus 4.7 的 64.3%，并在 Agentic Coding、Agentic Computer Use、Knowledge Work、Finance Agent 等多项测试中超过 GPT-5.5 与 Gemini 3.1 Pro。但在终端编程基准 Terminal-Bench 2.1 上，GPT-5.5 的 78.2% 仍高于 Opus 4.8 的 74.6%。

Anthropic also stated that it plans to roll out the more powerful Claude Mythos series models to all customers in the coming weeks. Anthropic 还表示，计划在未来数周内向所有客户推出能力更强的 Claude Mythos 系列模型。

🔗 Related reading: Just now, Claude Opus 4.8 went online, claiming to be DeepSeek and Qwen 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，Claude Opus 4.8 上线，张口就说自己是 DeepSeek、Qwen

item.title: 鸿蒙生态设备累计数超 13 亿
item.guid: 鸿蒙生态设备累计数超-13-亿
item.description:
Yesterday, at the OpenHarmony Developer Conference 2026, a Huawei representative stated that the cumulative number of HarmonyOS smart hardware ecosystem devices has exceeded 1.3 billion units . 昨天，开源鸿蒙开发者大会 2026 上，华为相关负责人在会上表示， 鸿蒙智能硬件生态设备累计数已超过 13 亿台 。

In addition, Xie Shaofeng, Chairman of the Open Atom Open Source Foundation, stated that the OpenHarmony community's code volume has exceeded 140 million lines, with over 13,000 contributors, supporting forms such as mobile phones, tablets, computers, TVs, wearables, and industrial smart terminals. 此外，开放原子开源基金会理事长谢少锋表示，开源鸿蒙社区代码量已突破 1.4 亿行，贡献者超过 13000 名，支持手机、平板、电脑、电视、穿戴和行业智能终端等形态。

item.title: DeepSeek 又崩了
item.guid: DeepSeek-又崩了
item.description:
Yesterday morning, a large number of users reported DeepSeek service anomalies on social platforms. DeepSeek's status page showed performance degradation in web chat and API services, and the incident was marked as "partial outage" at 10:21, affecting components including API services and web chat services. 昨天上午，有大量用户在社交平台反馈 DeepSeek 服务异常。DeepSeek 状态页显示，网页对话和 API 服务出现性能下降，事件在 10:21 被标记为「部分中断」，受影响组件包括 API 服务和网页对话服务。

The status page was updated at 10:27, showing that the cause had been identified and a fix was being implemented. The incident lasted approximately 22 minutes; an update at 10:50 showed that services had been restored. 状态页在 10:27 更新显示，原因已定位，修复正在实施。该事件持续约 22 分钟；10:50 更新显示，服务已恢复。

item.title: 小米超大众丰田成全球新能源第七
item.guid: 小米超大众丰田成全球新能源第七
item.description:
Trend Force Jibang recently released industry insights showing: Trend Force 集邦日前发布产业洞察显示：

In the first quarter of 2026, the combined sales of new energy vehicles, including battery electric vehicles (BEV), plug-in hybrid electric vehicles (PHEV), and hydrogen fuel cell vehicles, reached 3.94 million units, a 2% year-on-year decrease, accounting for 19% of global car sales in the first quarter.

Among them, China's new energy vehicle market entered an adjustment period; at the same time, the Western European market showed signs of recovery, and pure electric vehicle sales in Japan and South Korea also grew significantly. It is worth noting that: 其中，中国新能源车市场步入调整期；同时，西欧地区市场出现复苏迹象，日本和韩国的纯电车销量也有显著成长。值得关注的是：

    Tesla surpassed BYD to reclaim the pure electric vehicle sales championship;

    Leapmotor, in fifth place, achieved year-on-year sales growth against the trend, thanks to its rapidly expanding product matrix and cost-effective strategy;

    Xiaomi, with a 2.9% market share, surpassed Volkswagen and Toyota to rank seventh in pure electric vehicle sales.

item.title: OpenAI 基金会设立 2.5 亿美元 AI 基金
item.guid: OpenAI-基金会设立-2.5-亿美元-AI-基金
item.description:
The OpenAI Foundation, the non-profit entity controlling OpenAI, announced yesterday that it would invest an initial $250 million to help workers, communities, and economies adapt to changes in job and income structures brought about by AI. 控制 OpenAI 的非营利主体 OpenAI Foundation 昨日宣布，将投入首期 2.5 亿美元，用于帮助劳动者、社区和经济体应对 AI 带来的岗位与收入结构变化。

This funding will be used to research the impact of AI on the labor market, support workers and communities facing short-term job displacement pressure, and explore ways to more broadly distribute the economic benefits of AI. Public sources confirm the initial funding amount, funding directions, and the foundation's entity, with economic benefit distribution being one of the key focus areas for the fund. 这笔资金将用于研究 AI 对劳动力市场的影响、支持面临短期岗位替代压力的劳动者和社区，并探索更广泛分配 AI 经济收益的方式。公开来源可以确认首期资金规模、资助方向和基金会主体，经济收益分配会是基金重点关注的方向之一。

The OpenAI Foundation last year committed $50 million to support public interest projects, and this $250 million fund expands the focus from general public welfare to AI's impact on the workforce and benefit distribution. OpenAI Foundation 去年已承诺投入 5000 万美元支持公共利益项目，这次 2.5 亿美元基金把重点从泛公益扩展到 AI 劳动力冲击和收益分配。

item.title: 广东回应高考 AI 批卷传言
item.guid: 广东回应高考-AI-批卷传言
item.description:
According to Guangdong Education Media, the Guangdong Provincial Education Examinations Authority responded, stating that "Guangdong's summer college entrance examination uses AI for grading" is a false rumor. The report mentioned that Guangdong has indeed used intelligent technology in college entrance examination venue management in recent years, but its purpose is for examination safety aspects such as assisting patrols, security checks, radio signal shielding, and confidential room inspections. 据广东教育传媒报道，广东省教育考试院回应，称「广东夏季高考用 AI 批卷」为不实传言。报道提到，广东近年确实在高考考场管理中使用智能技术，但用途是辅助巡考、安检、无线电信号屏蔽和保密室巡检等考试安全环节。

The Guangdong Provincial Education Examinations Authority pointed out that subjective questions are still manually graded by teachers, with independent double grading. If the score difference exceeds the threshold, a third review is initiated. The system only performs random checks, real-time monitoring, and error correction assistance. In 2025, Guangdong's grading center will be located at South China Normal University, with over 6,200 teachers selected from across the province to participate in grading. 广东省教育考试院指出，主观题仍由教师人工评阅，实行双人独立评阅，评分差超过阈值时进入三评，系统只承担随机抽检、实时监控和纠错辅助。2025 年广东评卷点设在华南师范大学，全省选聘超 6200 名教师参与评卷。

item.title: 黄仁勋将加入清华经管顾问委员会
item.guid: 黄仁勋将加入清华经管顾问委员会
item.description:
According to the Financial Times, Jensen Huang has accepted an invitation to join the Tsinghua University School of Economics and Management Advisory Board (Tsinghua SEM Advisory Board). 据《金融时报》报道，黄仁勋已接受邀请，加入清华大学经济管理学院顾问委员会（Tsinghua SEM Advisory Board）。

The Tsinghua SEM Advisory Board was established in 2000, and its members have long included leaders of multinational corporations and prominent figures in economics and management. Apple CEO Tim Cook previously served as its chairman. The committee's mission is to help the school become a world-class institution for economics and management. 清华经管顾问委员会成立于 2000 年，成员长期包括跨国企业负责人和经济管理领域代表人物，苹果 CEO 库克此前担任该委员会主席，委员会的定位，是帮助学院建设成为世界一流的经济管理学院。

It is reported that the committee brings together the heads of tech giants such as Apple, Microsoft, Meta, Tesla, Alibaba, and Tencent, as well as the leaders of financial powerhouses like JPMorgan Chase, Blackstone Group, and Bridgewater. 据悉，该委员会云集了苹果、微软、Meta、特斯拉、阿里、腾讯等科技巨头的掌门人，以及摩根大通、黑石集团、桥水等金融巨鳄的掌舵者。

item.title: Google 工程师被控用内部搜索数据下注获利 120 万美元
item.guid: Google-工程师被控用内部搜索数据下注获利-120-万美元
item.description:
According to TechCrunch, the U.S. Department of Justice has sued Google software engineer Michele Spagnuolo, accusing him of using Google's internal non-public business information to profit $1.2 million on Polymarket. 据 TechCrunch 报道，美国司法部起诉 Google 软件工程师 Michele Spagnuolo，指控其利用 Google 内部非公开业务信息，在 Polymarket 上获利 120 万美元。

The indictment states that Spagnuolo used the "AlphaRaccoon" account on Polymarket to place bets related to the results of Google's 2025 Year in Search campaign, with a betting exposure exceeding $2.7 million. TechCrunch reported that these bets were related to Google's unreleased search trend data. 起诉材料称，Spagnuolo 在 Polymarket 上使用「AlphaRaccoon」账号，围绕 Google 2025 年 Year in Search 活动相关结果下注，涉案下注风险敞口超过 270 万美元。TechCrunch 报道提到，这些押注与 Google 尚未公开的搜索趋势数据有关。

item.title: 理想汽车一季度由盈转亏
item.guid: 理想汽车一季度由盈转亏
item.description:
Yesterday, Li Auto released its first-quarter 2026 financial results. During the period, total operating revenue was 22.983 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 11.4%; net loss attributable to parent company was 2.290 billion yuan, compared to a profit of 650 million yuan in the same period last year; gross profit was 1.808 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 66.0%, and gross margin was 7.9%, a year-on-year decrease of 12.6 percentage points. 昨天，理想汽车发布 2026 财年第一季度业绩，期内营业总收入 229.83 亿元，同比下降 11.4%；归母净亏损 22.90 亿元，去年同期为盈利 6.50 亿元；毛利 18.08 亿元，同比下降 66.0%，毛利率为 7.9%，同比下降 12.6 个百分点。

Operationally, Li Auto delivered 95,142 vehicles in the first quarter, a year-on-year increase of 2.5%. Vehicle gross margin fell to 6.1%, operating cash flow saw a net outflow of 6.091 billion yuan, and free cash flow saw a net outflow of 7.388 billion yuan. The company expects to deliver 95,000 to 100,000 vehicles in the second quarter, corresponding to revenues of 24.1 billion to 25.4 billion yuan. 经营层面，理想汽车一季度交付 95142 辆，同比增长 2.5%。车辆毛利率降至 6.1%，经营现金流净流出 60.91 亿元，自由现金流净流出 73.88 亿元。公司预计二季度交付 95000 至 100000 辆，对应收入 241 亿至 254 亿元。

As of April 30, Li Auto has 511 retail centers and 550 after-sales service centers in 160 cities, and has put into operation 4077 supercharging stations. 截至 4 月 30 日，理想汽车在 160 个城市拥有 511 家零售中心、550 家售后维修中心，投用 4077 座超充站。

item.title: 小鹏一季度亏损 17.8 亿元，人形机器人预计三季度亮相
item.guid: 小鹏一季度亏损-17.8-亿元，人形机器人预计三季度亮相
item.description:
Xpeng Motors released its unaudited results for the first quarter of 2026. During the period, total revenue was 13.03 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 17.6% and a quarter-on-quarter decrease of 41.4%; vehicle sales revenue was 11.00 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 23.5%, mainly affected by a decrease in delivery volume. The company's net loss in the first quarter was 1.78 billion yuan, compared to a loss of 660 million yuan in the same period last year, and a profit of 380 million yuan in the previous quarter. 小鹏汽车发布 2026 年第一季度未经审计业绩，期内总营收 130.3 亿元，同比下降 17.6%，环比下降 41.4%；车辆销售收入 110.0 亿元，同比下降 23.5%，主要受交付量下降影响。公司一季度净亏损 17.8 亿元，去年同期亏损 6.6 亿元，上一季度为盈利 3.8 亿元。

    The overall gross profit margin in the first quarter was 20.6%, higher than 15.6% in the same period last year, and lower than 21.3% in the previous quarter;

    The automotive gross profit margin was 12.1%, an increase of 1.6 percentage points year-on-year;

    R&D expenses were 2.91 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 46.8%, officially explained by increased investment in new models and AI-related technologies.

Xpeng expects to deliver 100,000 to 106,000 vehicles in the second quarter, a quarter-on-quarter increase of 59.5% to 69.1%; total revenue is expected to be 19.6 billion to 20.8 billion yuan. 小鹏预计二季度交付 10 万至 10.6 万辆，环比增长 59.5% 至 69.1%；总营收预计为 196 亿至 208 亿元。

He Xiaopeng, Chairman of Xpeng Group, stated at the Q1 earnings call that the R&D of the new generation Xpeng IRON humanoid robot's software and hardware, aimed at mass production, is progressing smoothly and is about to enter the ET2 software and hardware integration phase. It is planned to officially debut in the third quarter of this year , with the goal of achieving mass production of advanced humanoid robots by the end of this year. 小鹏集团董事长何小鹏在一季度财报电话会上表示，面向量产版本的新一代小鹏 IRON 人形机器人软硬件研发进展顺利，即将进入 ET2 软硬件合围阶段， 计划今年第三季度正式亮相 ，并以今年底实现高阶人形机器人量产为目标。

item.title: 微博一季度净营收 4.213 亿美元
item.guid: 微博一季度净营收-4.213-亿美元
item.description:
Weibo released its unaudited results for the first quarter of 2026. During the period, net revenue was $421.3 million, a year-on-year increase of 6%, or 1% at constant exchange rates; net profit attributable to Weibo shareholders was $34.7 million, with diluted earnings per share of $0.14. 微博发布 2026 年第一季度未经审计业绩，期内净营收 4.213 亿美元，同比增长 6%，按固定汇率计算同比增长 1%；归属于微博股东的净利润为 3470 万美元，摊薄每股收益 0.14 美元。

Advertising and marketing revenue remained the main driver, with Q1 revenue of $369.8 million, up 9% year-on-year; among which, advertising and marketing revenue excluding Alibaba's advertising revenue was $326.5 million, up 10% year-on-year. Value-added service revenue was $51.6 million, down 11% year-on-year, mainly due to reduced revenue contribution from game-related businesses. 广告和营销收入仍是主力，一季度收入 3.698 亿美元，同比增长 9%；其中不含阿里巴巴广告收入的广告和营销收入为 3.265 亿美元，同比增长 10%。增值服务收入为 5160 万美元，同比下降 11%，主要受游戏相关业务收入贡献减少影响。

In terms of user scale, Weibo's monthly active users in March were 562 million, and daily active users were 254 million. CEO Wang Gaofei mentioned in the financial report that the company optimized the homepage information flow consumption experience, improved the supply and distribution of high-quality video content, and enhanced search and advertising conversion efficiency through AI. 用户规模方面，微博 3 月月活跃用户为 5.62 亿，日活跃用户为 2.54 亿。CEO 王高飞在财报中提到，公司优化首页信息流消费体验、提升优质视频内容供给和分发，并通过 AI 强化搜索与广告转化效率。

item.title: MiniMax 年化收入两个月翻番
item.guid: MiniMax-年化收入两个月翻番
item.description:
According to Yicai, MiniMax disclosed its latest business data yesterday: the number of global enterprise and developer clients served by the company has exceeded 1 million, a 5-fold increase from six months ago; the global user base is approximately 300 million. 第一财经报道，MiniMax 昨日披露最新业务数据：公司服务的全球企业和开发者客户数已超过 100 万，较半年前增长 5 倍；全球用户规模约 3 亿。

In terms of revenue, MiniMax's annualized recurring revenue (ARR) has grown by over 100% in the past two months. The company previously disclosed at its March earnings conference that its ARR had exceeded $150 million in February 2026; based on this data, the ARR doubling cycle has been compressed to approximately 60 days. 收入方面，MiniMax 过去两个月年化经常性收入 ARR 增长超过 100%。公司此前在 3 月业绩会上披露，2026 年 2 月 ARR 已超过 1.5 亿美元；按这组数据计算，ARR 翻番周期已压缩到约 60 天。

Usage has also grown synchronously. MiniMax stated that the daily average token consumption of M2 series models has increased 6-fold within two months, and new registered users on the open platform have grown by more than 4 times. 使用量也同步增长。MiniMax 称，M2 系列模型日均 token 消耗量在两个月内增长 6 倍，开放平台新注册用户增长 4 倍以上。

item.title: OpenRouter 完成 1.13 亿美元 B 轮融资
item.guid: OpenRouter-完成-1.13-亿美元-B-轮融资
item.description:
AI model API platform OpenRouter officially announced the completion of a $113 million Series B funding round, led by Alphabet's growth fund CapitalG, with participation from NVentures, ServiceNow Ventures, MongoDB Ventures, Snowflake Ventures, Databricks Ventures, AMP PBC, Pace Capital, and existing investors a16z and Menlo Ventures. AI 模型 API 平台 OpenRouter 官方宣布完成 1.13 亿美元 B 轮融资，由 Alphabet 旗下成长基金 CapitalG 领投，NVentures、ServiceNow Ventures、MongoDB Ventures、Snowflake Ventures、Databricks Ventures、AMP PBC、Pace Capital 以及现有投资方 a16z 和 Menlo Ventures 参与。

The official statement said that over the past 6 months, the platform's weekly token processing volume grew from 5 trillion to 25 trillion, and this year's processing volume is expected to exceed 1,000 trillion tokens, serving over 8 million developers and covering more than 400 models. 官方称，过去 6 个月平台每周处理 token 量从 5 万亿增长到 25 万亿，今年处理量预计超过 1000 万亿 token，并服务 800 多万开发者，覆盖 400 多个模型。

The new funds will be used to expand infrastructure, enterprise capabilities, and intelligent routing. OpenRouter mentioned that the platform now supports image, audio, voice, transcription, embedding, and video models beyond text, and provides workspaces, cost management, guardrails, zero data retention policies, vendor-level failover, and cost/latency optimization. 新资金将用于扩展基础设施、企业能力和智能路由。OpenRouter 提到，平台已支持文本之外的图像、音频、语音、转写、嵌入和视频模型，并提供工作区、费用管理、guardrails、零数据保留策略、供应商级故障转移和成本/延迟优化。

item.title: 💡 罗福莉：MiMo API 降价来自更低推理成本
item.guid: 💡-罗福莉：MiMo-API-降价来自更低推理成本
item.description:
Xiaomi MiMo officially announced a permanent price reduction for its MiMo-V2.5 series API, with a maximum reduction of up to 99% compared to the original API pricing, and no longer distinguishing between context window lengths. Luo Fuli, head of Xiaomi MiMo, subsequently posted on the X platform to explain the technical reasons behind this price reduction. 小米 MiMo 官方日前宣布 MiMo-V2.5 系列 API 永久降价，相比原始 API 定价最高降幅可达 99%，且不再区分上下文窗口长度。小米 MiMo 负责人罗福莉随后在 X 平台发文，解释这次降价背后的技术原因。

Luo Fuli stated that MiMo's original inference cost is far below the industry average, and the new price "can basically maintain a break-even." She attributed the reasons to both the model and system sides: the model itself has undergone compression for inference efficiency, and the backend service has also reduced the cost per token through engineering optimization. 罗福莉表示，MiMo 的原始推理成本远低于行业平均水平，新价格「基本可以维持收支平衡」。她把原因归结为模型和系统两侧：模型本身在推理效率上做了压缩，后端服务也通过工程优化降低了单位 token 成本。

Luo Fuli emphasized that MiMo-V2.5 no longer differentiates prices by context window length, aiming to lower the barrier for long context usage and make it easier for developers to try it in practical applications. It is worth noting that Luo Fuli also advised peers in her post not to "blindly cut prices": 罗福莉强调，MiMo-V2.5 不再按上下文窗口长度区分价格，意在把长上下文使用门槛拉低，让开发者更容易在实际应用里试用。值得关注的是，罗福莉在帖文中还建议同行不要「盲目降价」：

We previously advised LLM companies not to "blindly cut prices" precisely because few model architectures and inference optimizations can prevent API costs from operating at a loss.

She believes that MiMo's low cost stems from its specific architectural design and inference optimization capabilities. If other companies lack similar foundations, blindly following suit could lead to losses. 她认为，MiMo 的低成本源于特定的架构设计与推理优化能力，若其他公司不具备类似基础，盲目跟进可能导致亏损。

She also elaborated on the industrial significance of this logic from a broader perspective: reasonably priced, high-performance model APIs will drive truly scaled inference demand, thereby accelerating the development of AI infrastructure chains such as chips, servers, liquid cooling, power supply, and data centers, forming a virtuous cycle in the industry. 她还从更宏观的角度阐述了这一逻辑的产业意义：价格合理、高性能的模型 API 将推动真正规模化的推理需求，进而带动芯片、服务器、液冷、供电及数据中心等 AI 基础设施链加速发展，形成行业良性循环。

item.title: 索尼 Bravia 2026 新款电视发布
item.guid: 索尼-Bravia-2026-新款电视发布
item.description:
Yesterday, Sony released new Bravia TV products at the 2026 Home Audio-Visual Entertainment New Product Launch, including the 9 Series Gen 2, 8 Series Gen 2, and 7 Series Gen 2, with prices starting from 10,999 yuan. 昨天，索尼在 2026 家庭影音娱乐新品发布会上发布 Bravia 电视新品，包括 9 系二代、8 系二代和 7 系二代，售价 10999 元起。

Among them, the 9 Series Gen 2 and 7 Series Gen 2 come standard with True RGB True Color Technology. This technology uses independent red, green, and blue LED backlights, enhancing color purity and brightness through finer backlight control. The 8 Series Gen 2 continues the OLED route, targeting users who pursue contrast and black level performance. 其中，9 系二代和 7 系二代标配 True RGB 真彩原色技术。该技术采用独立红、绿、蓝 LED 背光源，用更细的背光控制提升色彩纯度和亮度表现。8 系二代则延续 OLED 路线，面向追求对比度和黑位表现的用户。

🔗 Related reading: Is Sony's 149,999 yuan RGB TV a hit or a miss? We went to Sony headquarters to check it out 🔗 相关阅读： 149999 元的索尼 RGB 电视是夯是拉？我们去索尼总部瞧了瞧

item.title: 宋 Ultra DM-i 上市，12.99 万元起
item.guid: 宋-Ultra-DM-i-上市，12.99-万元起
item.description:
BYD yesterday launched the Song Ultra DM-i, the first B-segment plug-in hybrid SUV in its Dynasty series equipped with the 'DiDiXia' intelligent agent system. The new car comes in 5 models, priced from 129,900 yuan to 159,900 yuan. 比亚迪昨日发布王朝网首款搭载「迪迪虾」智能体系统的 B 级插混 SUV 宋 Ultra DM-i，新车共 5 款车型，售价 12.99 万元至 15.99 万元。

The Song Ultra DM-i has body dimensions of 4850/1910/1670mm, a wheelbase of 2840mm, and is equipped with fifth-generation DM technology. Its CLTC pure electric range is up to 310 kilometers, with a combined range of up to 1845 kilometers, and a fuel consumption of 3.3L/100km at low battery. The power system consists of a 1.5L engine and an electric motor, with the engine having a maximum power of 70kW and the motor a maximum power of 175kW. 宋 Ultra DM-i 的车身尺寸为 4850/1910/1670mm，轴距 2840mm，搭载第五代 DM 技术，CLTC 纯电续航最高 310 公里，综合续航最高 1845 公里，亏电油耗为 3.3L/100km 级别。动力系统由 1.5L 发动机和电机组成，发动机最大功率 70kW，电机最大功率 175kW。

In terms of configuration, the new car offers features such as a queen co-pilot seat, a large bed mode when the front and rear seats are folded down, a 16-speaker 'Sound of the Sky' audio system, Yunlian-C, and a TBC high-speed tire blowout stability system. 配置上，新车提供女王副驾、前后排座椅放倒后的大床模式、16 扬声器「天空之声」音响、云辇-C、TBC 高速爆胎稳行系统等。

The entry-level model also comes with 7 airbags, a panoramic sunroof, electric sunshade, electric tailgate, 19-inch wheels, a 15.6-inch central control screen, wireless charging, and a driving recorder. 入门车型也配有 7 安全气囊、全景天幕、电动遮阳帘、电动尾门、19 英寸轮毂、15.6 英寸中控屏、无线充电和行车记录仪。

item.title: 光帆 AI 穿戴设备接入腾讯出行
item.guid: 光帆-AI-穿戴设备接入腾讯出行
item.description:
Yesterday, LightSail Technology announced a partnership with Tencent Travel Services. LightSail AI full-sensing wearable devices will integrate with Tencent Travel Services, with related functions going live on June 5th. Users can initiate ride-hailing requests via voice, and the system will guide them through price estimation, ordering a ride, and automatic payment processes based on current location, destination, and other information. 昨天，光帆科技宣布与腾讯出行服务达成合作，光帆 AI 全感穿戴设备将接入腾讯出行服务，相关功能将于 6 月 5 日上线。用户可通过语音发起叫车需求，系统根据当前位置、目的地等信息，引导完成价格预估、下单叫车和自动支付流程。

After the user initiates a ride-hailing command via voice, the system can guide them through processes such as price estimation, ordering a ride, and automatic payment based on current location and destination information. 用户通过语音发起叫车指令后，系统可依据当前位置与目的地信息，引导完成价格预估、下单叫车及自动支付等流程。

LightSail AI full-sensing wearable device is LightSail Technology's first product, officially launched on May 15th. According to official information, after its launch, the product topped JD.com's AI headphone best-seller list, maintaining the top position for 8 consecutive days. The first batch of products has currently sold out, and a new round of pre-sales has begun. 光帆 AI 全感穿戴设备是光帆科技旗下首款产品，已于 5 月 15 日正式开售。官方信息显示，该产品上线后登顶京东 AI 耳机热卖榜 TOP1，并连续 8 天保持榜首位置，首批产品目前已售罄，现已开启新一轮预售。

item.title: vivo 官宣首款头戴式耳机 6 大卖点
item.guid: vivo-官宣首款头戴式耳机-6-大卖点
item.description:
vivo yesterday announced 6 major selling points for its first wireless over-ear noise-canceling headphones, which will be officially released on May 29th at 19:30. The official statement claims that these headphones feature 58dB active noise cancellation, 75 hours of battery life, and a lightweight wear of 238g. vivo 昨日公布首款无线头戴降噪耳机的 6 大卖点，并将于 5 月 29 日 19:30 正式发布。官方宣称，这款耳机主打 58dB 主动降噪、75 小时续航和 238g 轻量佩戴。

The product also features ultra-soft leather earcups and supports seamless connection across three devices in different ecosystems, targeting long commutes, office work, and audio-visual scenarios. 产品还采用超软皮质耳罩，支持跨生态三设备无缝连接，面向长时间通勤、办公和影音场景。

item.title: 小米招聘 Agent 上线
item.guid: 小米招聘-Agent-上线
item.description: Yesterday, Xiaomi officially announced the launch of its 'Xiaomi Recruitment Agent' on its recruitment website, powered by the Xiaomi MiMo large model. According to reports, the Xiaomi Recruitment Agent can provide job seekers with policy explanations, intelligent job recommendations, and recruitment progress inquiries on Xiaomi's recruitment website. 昨天，小米官方宣布，其招聘官网正式上线「小米招聘 Agent」，依托 Xiaomi MiMo 大模型。据介绍，小米招聘 Agent 能在小米招聘官网为求职者提供政策解答、职位智能推荐、招聘进展查询等服务。

item.title: OPPO Watch X3 理想定制款上线
item.guid: OPPO-Watch-X3-理想定制款上线
item.description:
Li Auto officially announced yesterday that the OPPO Watch X3 Li Auto customized edition has been launched on the Li Auto Mall, with a limited-time price of 2329.1 yuan. 理想汽车昨天官宣，OPPO Watch X3 理想汽车定制款已上线理想商城，限时价 2329.1 元。

This smartwatch focuses on linking with Li Auto's car key and car control scenarios. The main product is based on the OPPO Watch X3, with the Li Auto customized edition highlighting on-wrist unlocking, car control access, and owner benefits as its core selling points. 这款手表主打与理想汽车的车钥匙和车控场景联动，产品主体来自 OPPO Watch X3，理想定制版把核心卖点放在腕上解锁、车控入口和车主权益。

item.title: 博通发布首批 Wi-Fi 8 路由器集成芯片
item.guid: 博通发布首批-Wi-Fi-8-路由器集成芯片
item.description:
Recently, Broadcom released three Wi-Fi 8 router integrated chips, BCM6772, BCM6774, and BCM6776, targeting next-generation home, enterprise, and carrier routing devices. 近期，博通发布 BCM6772、BCM6774 和 BCM6776 三款 Wi-Fi 8 路由器集成芯片，面向下一代家庭、企业和运营商路由设备。

According to reports, Wi-Fi 8 focuses on improving stable connections, low latency, and multi-device concurrent experience in complex wireless environments. This batch of Broadcom chips targets routers of different specifications, supporting manufacturers in integrating wireless, network processing, and system functions on a single-chip solution, thereby reducing the complexity of overall machine design. 据介绍，Wi-Fi 8 重点在于提高复杂无线环境中的稳定连接、低延迟和多设备并发体验。博通这批芯片面向不同规格路由器，支持厂商在单芯片方案上集成无线、网络处理和系统功能，降低整机设计复杂度。

item.title: 阿里达摩院发布 GPU 版本求解器
item.guid: 阿里达摩院发布-GPU-版本求解器
item.description:
Yicai Global cited news from the DAMO Academy's official WeChat account, stating that Alibaba DAMO Academy's 'MindOpt' solver has officially released its GPU version, leveraging GPU parallel acceleration capabilities and introducing new algorithms to address the 'long-tail effect' in large-scale optimization problems. 第一财经援引达摩院官微消息称，阿里巴巴达摩院「敏迭」求解器 MindOpt 正式发布 GPU 版本，利用 GPU 并行加速能力，并引入新算法处理大规模优化问题中的「长尾效应」。

Damo Academy stated that in about 2000 general test cases, MindOpt can stably solve over 99% of problem types to high precision, and supports billion-variable linear programming problems that are traditionally difficult to handle. The solver primarily serves complex computing scenarios such as power dispatch, flight scheduling, high-end manufacturing, and financial management. 达摩院称，在约 2000 个通用算例测试中，敏迭可将 99% 以上的问题类型稳定求解至高精度，并支持传统上难以处理的亿级变量线性规划问题。求解器主要服务电力调度、航班编排、高端制造、金融管理等复杂计算场景。

Traditional linear programming solvers are mostly designed based on CPUs. As problem scales increase, matrix decomposition, memory requirements, and parallelism become bottlenecks. The GPU version pushes large-scale optimization problems from "can it be computed" to solution times and resource costs closer to what is usable in industrial systems. 传统线性规划求解器多基于 CPU 设计，随着问题规模扩大，矩阵分解、内存需求和并行度都会成为瓶颈。GPU 版本把大规模优化问题从「算不算得动」推进到更接近工业系统可用的求解时间和资源成本。

item.title: 阿里 Qoder 推出 Cloud Agents
item.guid: 阿里-Qoder-推出-Cloud-Agents
item.description:
Alibaba Qoder has launched Cloud Agents, a fully managed AI Agent operating platform, providing enterprises with Agent foundations, model services, and runtime environments. Enterprises can call APIs to have Agents execute tasks in the cloud. 阿里 Qoder 上线全托管 AI Agent 运行平台 Cloud Agents，向企业提供 Agent 底座、模型服务和运行环境等能力。企业可通过 API 调用，让 Agent 在云端执行任务。

Qoder documentation shows that developers can define Agents and start sessions via API, with complex tasks running in the cloud and results being returned in real-time. Alibaba Cloud states that this platform can shorten the Agent's online cycle from approximately 1 month to 1 day. Qoder 文档显示，开发者可以定义 Agent 并通过 API 启动 Session，复杂任务会在云端运行，并将结果实时回传。阿里云称，该平台可把 Agent 上线周期从约 1 个月缩短至 1 天。

item.title: 自变量机器人开源 Wall-OSS-0.5，具身大模型预训练后可直接部署
item.guid: 自变量机器人开源-Wall-OSS-0.5，具身大模型预训练后可直接部署
item.description:
X-Square Robot yesterday released and open-sourced the embodied large model Wall-OSS-0.5, officially positioning it as a "pre-train once, deploy anywhere" Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model. Its core selling point is that it can be directly deployed on machines after pre-training without any task-specific fine-tuning. Wall-OSS-0.5 introduces four technologies: 自变量机器人昨日发布并开源了具身大模型 Wall-OSS-0.5，官方将其定位为「预训练一次，随处部署」的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，核心卖点是预训练完成后无需任何任务微调即可直接上机部署。Wall-OSS-0.5 引入了四项技术：

    Gradient-bridge collaborative training mechanism, allowing the three modalities of vision, language, and action to learn collaboratively in a unified optimization direction, extending the physical common sense accumulated from vision-language pre-training to the action dimension;

    VLA-oriented unified visual-action representation, which binds action codebooks with visual features based on residual vector quantization, using future frame changes as the reconstruction target, so that each action token corresponds to an observable physical change, thereby simultaneously improving real-machine action accuracy and multimodal reasoning capabilities;

    Action-Space Supervision, which calculates loss in the decoded real action space, allowing gradients to directly reflect control errors, and automatically weighting critical moments of physical interaction to accelerate convergence;

    DMuon, the first distributed Muon optimizer for embodied large-scale pre-training, reconstructs communication patterns through exclusive ownership scheduling and eliminates redundant computations with symmetry-aware CuteDSL kernels, reducing the extra overhead introduced by Muon by approximately 100 times.

Official test results show that Wall-OSS-0.5 achieved an autonomous completion rate of over 80% in 4 out of 17 real-machine zero-shot tasks; in fair comparisons across more than a dozen real robot tasks, its performance in manipulation and reasoning tasks surpassed similar open-source models. 官方测试结果显示，Wall-OSS-0.5 在 17 个真机零样本任务中，有 4 个任务自主完成率超过 80%；在十余个真实机器人任务的公平对比中，操作类和推理类任务表现领先同类开源模型。

💻 GitHub: github.com/X-Square-Robot/wall-x 💻 GitHub: github.com/X-Square-Robot/wall-x

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/x-square-robot/wall-oss-0.5 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/x-square-robot/wall-oss-0.5

item.title: WBench 开源交互式世界模型基准
item.guid: WBench-开源交互式世界模型基准
item.description:
Fudan University and Meituan LongCat team open-sourced WBench, used for evaluating interactive video world models. The benchmark includes 289 multi-turn test cases, covering 5 evaluation dimensions, and is calibrated using 22 metrics against human judgment. 复旦大学与美团 LongCat 团队开源 WBench，用于评估交互式视频世界模型。基准包含 289 个多轮测试用例，覆盖 5 个评估维度，并使用 22 项指标与人类判断进行校准。

This benchmark focuses on the model's physical rules, spatio-temporal consistency, instruction following, and control capabilities in continuous interactions, with evaluation criteria higher than single video generation quality. The paper abstract summarizes the 5 dimensions as video quality, scene adherence, interaction adherence, consistency, and physical compliance. 这套基准关注的是模型在连续交互里的物理规则、时空一致性、指令遵循和控制能力，评价对象高于单次视频生成质量。论文摘要将 5 个维度概括为视频质量、场景遵循、交互遵循、一致性和物理合规性。

💻 GitHub: github.com/meituan-longcat/WBench 💻 GitHub: github.com/meituan-longcat/WBench

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/datasets/meituan-longcat/WBench 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/datasets/meituan-longcat/WBench

item.title: 曝豆包接入抖音生活服务闭环，支持直接买团购
item.guid: 曝豆包接入抖音生活服务闭环，支持直接买团购
item.description:
According to "Dujia" reports, ByteDance's AI assistant Doubao is integrating with Douyin Life Services, providing group-buying package recommendations, in-app merchant pages, payment, and offline verification processes within the platform. 据《读佳》报道，字节跳动旗下 AI 助手豆包正在与抖音生活服务整合，在站内提供团购套餐推荐、端内商家页面、支付和线下核销流程。

After a user initiates a group-buying inquiry on Doubao, Doubao will recommend corresponding stores and package details; clicking on it will lead to an in-app merchant page to complete package selection and purchase. 用户在豆包发起团购咨询后，豆包会推荐对应门店和套餐详情；点击后可进入端内商家页，完成套餐选择和购买。

item.title: 美团发布即时零售商家 AI 方案
item.guid: 美团发布即时零售商家-AI-方案
item.description:
Yesterday, Meituan released its first AI solution exclusively for instant retail merchant operations, "Claw." This solution is aimed at instant retail merchants, covering scenarios such as operational analysis, product management, marketing activities, and operational recommendations. 昨天，美团发布首个即时零售商家经营专属 AI 解决方案「牵牛花 Claw」。该方案面向即时零售商家，覆盖经营分析、商品管理、营销活动和运营建议等场景。

The challenges of instant retail stem from rapid changes in products, inventory, fulfillment, and local demand. Merchants need to frequently adjust product supply, prices, and activities. Meituan integrates AI tools into the operational backend, aiming to transform platform-side data capabilities into actionable steps for merchants. 即时零售的难点来自商品、库存、履约和本地需求的快速变化。商家需要频繁调整商品供给、价格和活动，美团把 AI 工具放到经营后台，目标是把平台侧数据能力转成商家可直接执行的动作。

item.title: 京沪联合约谈三大外卖平台
item.guid: 京沪联合约谈三大外卖平台
item.description:
According to CCTV News, the Beijing Municipal Market Supervision Bureau and the Shanghai Municipal Market Supervision Bureau signed the "Framework Agreement for Cooperation on Food Safety Governance of Online Catering Third-Party Platforms," establishing a collaborative governance mechanism for online catering food safety, and for the first time jointly conducted administrative guidance for Meituan, Taobao Flash Buy, and JD Waimai, the three major food delivery platform companies. 据央视新闻报道，北京市市场监管局、上海市市场监管局签订《网络餐饮第三方平台食品安全治理合作框架协议》，建立网络餐饮食品安全协同治理机制，并首次联合对美团、淘宝闪购、京东外卖三大外卖平台企业开展行政指导。

Market supervision departments in both regions will collaborate in areas such as data sharing, information exchange, risk joint control, and law enforcement linkage, promoting food delivery platforms to implement a "online review + offline verification" dual-track system, and urging platforms to verify and compare the food business licenses and other qualification information of online catering merchants with provincial market supervision data. 两地市场监管部门将在数据共享、信息互通、风险联控、执法联动等领域协作，推动外卖平台落实「线上审核 + 线下核验」双轨制，并督促平台把入网餐饮商户的食品经营许可等资质信息与省级市场监管数据进行核验比对。

This administrative guidance corresponds to the "Supervision and Management Regulations for Online Catering Service Operators to Implement Food Safety Main Responsibilities" which will come into effect on June 1. Regulatory authorities require platforms to improve substantive qualification review, online information disclosure, meal delivery management, and food safety management systems. 这次行政指导对应 6 月 1 日将施行的《网络餐饮服务经营者落实食品安全主体责任监督管理规定》。监管部门要求平台完善资质实质性审核、线上信息公示、餐品配送管理和食品安全管理制度。

item.title: 《年会不能停 2！》定档 8 月 7 日
item.guid: 《年会不能停-2！》定档-8-月-7-日
item.description:
Yesterday, the workplace comedy film "Never Stop Annual Meeting 2!" officially announced its release date, set for August 7, starring Zhang Ruoyun and Bai Ke. 昨天，职场喜剧电影《年会不能停 2！》官宣定档，将于 8 月 7 日上映，张若昀、白客领衔主演。

The predecessor, "Never Stop Annual Meeting!", centered its comedy on the organizational structure of large internet companies, workplace jargon, and annual meeting culture, gaining discussion from a "worker" perspective. The sequel continues to use the workplace comedy genre, and the combination of Zhang Ruoyun and Bai Ke also maintains the film's clear positioning towards young and workplace audiences. 前作《年会不能停！》以互联网大厂组织架构、职场黑话和年会文化为喜剧核心，凭借「打工人」视角获得讨论。续集继续使用职场喜剧类型，张若昀和白客的组合也让影片维持了面向年轻观众和职场观众的明确定位。

item.title: 《X 战警 ’97》第二季定档 7 月 1 日
item.guid: 《X-战警-’97》第二季定档-7-月-1-日
item.description:
Marvel animated series "X-Men '97" Season 2 will premiere on Disney+ on July 1st this year, with the official release of the Season 2 poster and trailer yesterday. 漫威动画剧集《X战警 ’97》第二季将于今年 7 月 1 日登陆 Disney+，官方昨日同步发布了第二季海报及预告。

Season 2 consists of nine episodes, continuing the storyline of Season 1, set in the 1990s, telling the story of a group of mutants with extraordinary abilities protecting humanity in a hostile world. 第二季共九集，延续第一季的故事线，以 1990 年代为背景，讲述一群拥有异能的变种人在充满敌意的世界中保护人类的故事。

"X-Men '97" Season 1 premiered on Disney+ in 2024, becoming one of the platform's most-watched animated works and receiving an Emmy nomination. 《X战警 ’97》第一季于 2024 年在 Disney+ 上线，是该平台观看量最高的动画作品之一，并获得艾美奖提名。

item.title: 《匹兹堡医魂》第三季已获 HBO 续订
item.guid: 《匹兹堡医魂》第三季已获-HBO-续订
item.description:
According to Deadline, HBO medical drama "Pittsburgh Medical Soul" has been renewed for a third season before its second season aired. The second season aired from January to April this year, with a total of 15 episodes, and the third season will continue to revolve around emergency doctor Robby and the hospital's emergency system. 据 Deadline 报道，HBO 医疗剧《匹兹堡医魂》已在第二季播出前获得第三季续订。第二季今年 1 月至 4 月播出，共 15 集，第三季将继续围绕急诊医生 Robby 和医院急诊系统展开。

"Pittsburgh Medical Soul" emphasizes real-time feel and high-pressure emergency scenes, with each season presenting internal hospital cases, resource allocation, and character relationships through a series of continuous shifts. 《匹兹堡医魂》主打实时感和高压急诊场景，每季通过一组连续班次呈现医院内部的病例、资源调度和人物关系。
